MLT.SettingAutoSyncTargetsHint: If checked, targeting or detargeting a token will also target or detarget its clones (or originals).
MLT.SettingAutoSyncChatBubblesHint: If checked, chat bubbles for a token will also be shown on its clones (or originals).
MLT.SettingCloneActorLinkHint: If enabled, cloned tokens link to the actor of the original token. Otherwise, cloned tokens will be 'dummy' tokens with no actor.
MLT.SettingCloneModuleFlags: Clone token flags set by other modules
MLT.SettingCloneModuleFlagsHint: Modules can set custom flags on tokens for their own use. If checked, cloned tokens will inherit such flags from the original. Since the purpose of these flags depends on the module in question, I can't tell you what this option will do, but if cloned tokens are interacting poorly with some other module, you can try changing it.
MLT.SettingNotifyGmTeleportHint: Send a whispered chat message to the GM whenever a token uses a teleporter, with a button to follow the token to its destination.
MLT.TabNotes: Use this Drawing to define a region for automation with Multilevel Tokens.
MLT.SectionTeleportsNotes: Tokens moving into an In region will be teleported to an Out region with a matching identifier.
MLT.FieldActivateViaMapNoteNotes: Tokens within the In region will be teleported only when their owner (or a GM) clicks on a Map Note within the region.
MLT.FieldSnapToGridNotes: Tokens will be snapped to the grid when teleporting to this Out region.
MLT.FieldSceneLocalNotes: Restrict teleport and cloning regions to match only with other regions on the same scene.
MLT.SectionTokenCloningNotes: Tokens will be cloned from Source regions to any Target regions with matching identifiers.
MLT.SectionTargetRegionNotes: Settings for cloned tokens created by this Target region.
MLT.SectionMacroTriggersNotes: Trigger a macro when a token enters this region, leaves it, or moves within it. Within the macro, the variables scene, region, token and actor give the Scene, Drawing, Token and Actor objects involved.
MLT.SectionMacroEventsNotes: Within the macro, the event variable will take one of the values MLT.ENTER, MLT.LEAVE, or MLT.MOVE.
MLT.FieldAdditionalArgumentsNotes: Comma-separated, available in the args variable within your macro.
MLT.SectionLevelsNotes: Tokens moving onto a @stairs token will be teleported to any other @stairs token at the same relative position within a numerically-adjacent level region.
MLT.FieldDisableRegionNotes: Temporarily disable all automation features for this region.
MLT.TipDisable: Temporarily turns off all MLT automation (teleport, cloning, macros) for this drawing region.
MLT.TipLocal: When enabled, this region will only match with other regions on the same scene. Useful to prevent cross-scene teleports.
MLT.TipIn: Mark this drawing as a teleport entry point. Tokens entering this region will be teleported to a matching Out region.
MLT.TipOut: Mark this drawing as a teleport destination. Tokens from a matching In region will appear here.
MLT.TipTeleportId: A unique text identifier to link In and Out regions. Regions with the same ID are connected.
MLT.TipSnapToGrid: Tokens arriving at this Out region will be snapped to the nearest grid position.
MLT.TipAnimate: Show a movement animation when the token teleports, instead of instant placement.
MLT.TipMapNote: Instead of auto-teleporting on entry, require the player to click a Map Note inside the region to trigger the teleport.
MLT.TipTeleportSound: File path to a sound effect played when this teleporter activates (e.g. sounds/doors/door.ogg). Leave empty for no sound.
MLT.TipSource: Tokens inside this Source region will be cloned to all matching Target regions.
MLT.TipTarget: Cloned tokens from a matching Source region will appear in this Target region.
MLT.TipCloneId: A unique text identifier to link Source and Target regions. Regions with the same ID are connected.
MLT.TipFlipX: Mirror the cloned token image horizontally.
MLT.TipFlipY: Mirror the cloned token image vertically.
MLT.TipTrueMirror: True mirror: also flips the token rotation, creating a realistic mirror effect.
MLT.TipMacroEnter: Execute the specified macro when a token enters this region.
MLT.TipMacroLeave: Execute the specified macro when a token leaves this region.
MLT.TipMacroMove: Execute the specified macro each time a token moves within this region.
MLT.TipMacroArgs: Comma-separated values passed as the 'args' array variable inside your macro.
MLT.TipLevel: Define this region as a vertical level for stair-based teleportation between floors.
MLT.TipLevelNumber: The floor number. @stairs tokens will teleport between numerically adjacent levels (e.g. 1↔2).
MLT.SettingPausedHint: Pauses all MLT automation without deactivating the module. When enabled: teleportation is disabled, and navigation map notes inside teleport regions are hidden from players. Useful when using individual maps without interconnected world navigation.
